message:
fix: resolve clippy warnings in doctor.rs and q.rs

- Collapse nested `if` into `if-let` chain (collapsible_if)
- Flip negated boolean check to positive form (unnecessary_bool_not)
- Allow too_many_lines on q::execute (linear flow, splitting hurts readability)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
